title: Top 10 Must-Watch Movies of the Year
description: The article is a table listing the top 10 movies of 2016, along with their directors, genres, and IMDb ratings. The list includes a mix of genres, including musical, drama, sci-fi, and action, with La La Land, Hacksaw Ridge, and Deadpool among the top-rated films.

title: Top Headlines of 2016: From Prince to Trump
description: The article lists major events that occurred in 2016, including the election of Donald Trump as President of the United States, terrorist attacks in Brussels and Orlando, and the death of Fidel Castro.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road Dominates Oscars with 6 Wins
description: The 88th Academy Awards saw "Spotlight" win Best Picture, Alejandro G. I��rritu win Best Director for "The Revenant", Leonardo DiCaprio win Best Actor for "The Revenant", and Brie Larson win Best Actress for "Room". "Mad Max: Fury Road" won the most awards with six, including Best Costume Design, Best Production Design, Best Makeup and Hairstyling, Best Film Editing, Best Sound Editing, and Best Sound Mixing.
